name: C3.ai, Inc.
summary: C3.ai, Inc. is an Enterprise AI application software company that delivers the C3 Agentic AI Platform for developing, deploying, and operating Enterprise AI applications; C3 AI Applications, a portfolio of industry-specific Enterprise AI applications; and C3 Generative AI, a library of agentic AI applications for data retrieval, analysis, and workflow orchestration. Built on patented model-driven and agent orchestration architecture, C3 AI software enables digital transformation across industries globally.

products.name: C3 Agentic AI Platform
products.description: End-to-end platform for developing, deploying, and operating Enterprise AI applications using patented model-driven architecture.

products.name: C3 AI Applications
products.description: Portfolio of industry-specific Enterprise AI applications enabling digital transformation of organizations globally.

products.name: C3 Generative AI
products.description: Library of agentic AI applications using LLMs and domain-specific agents to retrieve data, analyze information, surface insights, and orchestrate workflows.
